_readme: Written by the Cowork laptop task. Board reads this every 15 min. Keep newest first, max ~8 posts. 'time' is the post's UTC timestamp; the board renders GST.

posts.text:
Experience every moment: 2026/27 Matchday Hospitality now on sale!

A range of brand-new hospitality options are now available at the Etihad Stadium, with the introduction of new suites Zadie’s, Crossbar and City Hall as well as the new Pitch View Rooms!

Make your matchday unforgettable by booking one of our incredible hospitality experiences

http://mancity.co/HospitalityX

England’s World Cup journey comes to an end against Argentina.

A campaign to be proud of for our Three Lions 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿

Fighting for their place in the World Cup final! 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿🦁

Best of luck to our English quartet as they take on Argentina in Atlanta this evening! 🩵
Don't miss your chance to win a shirt signed by World Cup finalist, Rodri! 👕

3⃣️1⃣️ years ago today, @giorgiking10 became a Blue! 🩵

The Magician of Maine Road 💫

Who will join Spain in New York this Sunday?

Lock in your prediction now! ⬇️
